title: Configuration Run Measures Request
description: PUT /api/v1/configuration-runs/{config_run_id}/measures. The backend accepts a {"measures": ...} body where measures is either a flat MeasuresDict or a list of per-example results (validate_measures_dict/list).

measures.description: Flat MeasuresDict (identifier keys -> number|null, max 50) or a list of per-example result objects.
